'''Rima''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Demar system/Legends|Demar system]]. Its closeness to the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] [[Demar (star)|sun]] caused it to be a lifeless, super-hot ball of rock. Though the entire Demar system was owned by the [[Lant Mining Corporation]], Rima was never mined due to a lack of resources and the difficulty of working so close to the supergiant sun.
